Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction To Halt Sale Of Realty
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause regarding preliminary Injunction to halt sale of realty. Appearances: Sheila James, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing, and moving party. (Regina Fontenau, friend of Plaintiff appearing to support Plaintiff); Martha L. Passalaua, Esq. of the Law Office of Glenn Wechsler, (925) 274-0200, (Appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Defendant First American Loanstar Trustee Services, and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Request for Preliminary Injunction denied. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate a reasonable probability of success on the merits. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction To Halt Sale Of Realty
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Continued To Mar-16-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause re: preliminary injunction to halt sale of realty. Appearances: Sheila James, Plaintiff, in Pro Per appearing. There are no other appearances. Plaintiff did not give notice to other side, pursuant to Local Rule 8.3. The Court vacates the Tentative Ruling, and continues the matter to March 16, 2009. Court clerk to call Defense Counsel and advise of the continuance Date. (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction To Halt Sale Of Realty

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause regarding Preliminary Injunction to halt sale of property. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to March 3, 2009, pursuant to request of Defendant Loanstar. See CCP 527(d)(4). Defendant may file a supplemental opposition by February 23, 2009 and any supplemental reply is due February 27, 2009. (302/PHA/PB)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
